dmdprices

An R package for looking up medicine prices from the NHS dm+d (Dictionary of Medicines and Devices), with tools for inflation adjustment using the NHS Cost Inflation Index (NHS CII).

A bundled dataset (Week 34 2025, 14 August 2025) is included — no setup required for immediate use.

Installation 

devtools::install_github("w-hardy/dmdprices")

Quick start 

library(dmdprices)

# Search medicine prices — uses bundled data, no setup needed
dmd_price_lookup("metformin")

# Adjust a cost for inflation between NHS financial years
inflate_nhscii(100, "2019/20", "2023/24")

Interactive apps

No R required — use the hosted apps directly:

  • dm+d Price Lookup — search medicine prices by name with partial, exact, or fuzzy matching
  • NHS CII Cost Adjuster — adjust costs between NHS financial years

Or run locally:

run_dmd_price_lookup()
run_inflate_nhscii()

Learn more

Troubleshooting Troubleshooting

Data attribution

The dmd_master dataset is derived from the NHS Dictionary of Medicines and Devices (dm+d), Week 34 2025 release (14 August 2025), published by the NHS Business Services Authority (NHSBSA).

© Crown copyright. Licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0.

NHS CII rates are from the PSSRU Unit Costs of Health and Social Care, published under the Open Government Licence.
